title: Big Buck Bunny (HLS Stream)
description: A lovable, giant rabbit plots a comical revenge against three woodland pests in this beautifully rendered open-source animation, served over a high-velocity live stream channel.

title: Sintel Trailer (HD Stream)
description: An intense, high-end fantasy short tracking a lone warrior named Sintel on an emotional quest across a dangerous, sweeping fantasy landscape.

title: Tears of Steel (VFX Stream)
description: A cinema-grade science fiction film showcasing advanced visual effects, massive mechanical robotic combat, and a sleek cyberpunk dystopian world aesthetic.
